name: WATI Human Approval v2 - Training Data Capture

parameters.content: When a user clicks a button in Slack, Slack sends a webhook payload to n8n workflow and expects a response within 3 seconds. Otherwise, it'll show an operation time-out error

### Setup Required
1. Configure Google Sheets OAuth2 credential on both "Log" nodes
2. Deactivate the old wati-human-approval workflow before activating this one

parameters.content: When a user clicks a button in Slack, Slack sends a webhook payload to n8n workflow and expects a response within 3 seconds. Otherwise, it'll show an operation time-out error

### Setup Required
1. Configure Google Sheets OAuth2 credential on both "Log" nodes
2. Deactivate the old wati-human-approval workflow before activating this one
